name: programas-omie
description: Sistema integrado Omie - Menu + Separador + Recebimento + Separador OP + Separador Remessa + Inventário + Requisição Material + Estoque + Programas Auxiliares

scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others --names "Menu-Back,Menu-Front,Separador-Back,Separador-Front,Recebimento-Back,Recebimento-Front,OP-Back,OP-Front,Remessa-Back,Remessa-Front,Inventario-Back,Inventario-Front,Requisicao-Back,Requisicao-Front,Estoque-Back,Estoque-Front,Auxiliares-Back,Auxiliares-Front,Relatorio-Back,Relatorio-Front,Agendador" --prefix-colors "bgBlue.bold,bgMagenta.bold,bgGreen.bold,bgYellow.bold,bgCyan.bold,bgRed.bold,bgWhite.bold,bgBlack.bold,bgGray.bold,bgBrightBlue.bold,bgCyan.bold,bgMagenta.bold,bgGreen.bold,bgYellow.bold,bgWhite.bold,bgCyan.bold,bgRed.bold,bgMagenta.bold,bgBlue.bold,bgGreen.bold,bgYellow.bold" "npm start -w menu-principal-backend" "npm run dev -w menu-principal-frontend" "npm start -w programa-separador-backend" "npm run dev -w programa-separador-frontend" "npm start -w programa-recebimento-backend" "npm run dev -w programa-recebimento-frontend" "npm start -w programa-separador-op-backend" "npm run dev -w programa-separador-op-frontend" "npm start -w programa-separador-remessa-backend" "npm run dev -w programa-separador-remessa-frontend" "npm start -w programa-inventario-backend" "npm run dev -w programa-inventario-frontend" "npm start -w requisicao-material-backend" "npm run dev -w requisicao-material-frontend" "npm start -w programa-estoque-backend" "npm run dev -w programa-estoque-frontend" "npm start -w programas-auxiliares-backend" "npm run dev -w programas-auxiliares-frontend" "npm start -w programa-relatorio-backend" "npm run dev -w programa-relatorio-frontend" "npm start -w agendador-atualizacoes"
